name: Marinated Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a steamer basket in 6 inches of water in a saucepan or skillet (water should not touch the bottom of the basket).
2. Place asparagus spears in the basket.
3. Cover tightly and bring to boiling. Reduce heat.
4. Steam until crisp-tender, 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Immediately rinse under running cold water; drain.
6. In a tightly covered container, shake remaining ingredients together.
7. Pour the mixture over asparagus. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours, turning occasionally.
8. Garnish with orange slices if desired.
Serves: 4 (about 5 spears)
